summary: Validated requested public endpoints and UI on QuantChat tunnel. Login and authenticated shell work on the live tunnel, core auth/search/conversation/message APIs pass via public URL, and quantchat.online still correctly shows Hostinger parking (expected current state).

ui_bugs.issue: Duplicate data-testid values exist across hidden mobile and desktop trees, causing Playwright visibility/click ambiguity for search/start-chat controls.

action_items: For stable automation, make data-testid values unique per visible layout (desktop/mobile) or expose a single rendered search panel per breakpoint.
Proceed with DNS cutover from Hostinger parking to Azure VM when networking (public 80/443) is opened.
Optional hardening: remove backend default FRONTEND_URL fallback and require env-only config to match fail-fast policy.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py is 767 lines (>700 guideline); split into route modules for maintainability.
FRONTEND_URL currently has a localhost default; env-only URL config is preferred for production parity.
Auth cookies are set with secure=False; for HTTPS production traffic this should be secure=True (with proper proxy/TLS setup).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tunnel URL tested: https://get-painting-consumers-completing.trycloudflare.com. Verified: /api/health, login, /api/auth/me, user search, conversation create, send/get messages, and configured backend URL health. quantchat.online currently returns Hostinger parked page title/content as expected. UI login/chat shell passes; deeper search->start-chat UI automation repeatedly hit hidden duplicate-testid visibility ambiguity.
rca of the issue: Playwright failed three times on search/start-chat clicks despite visible UI because the app renders both mobile and desktop component trees with identical data-testid values; hidden tree elements are selected first, producing Element is not visible errors. Mitigation: unique testids by breakpoint or query with explicit :visible selectors in tests.
